*PI NIKOKRATOYS ARCONT
OS EPI THS AIGEIDOS PRWT
HS PRYTANEIAS TWN PROED
RWN EPEUHFIZEN QEOFILO
S FHGOYSIOS EDOXEN THI B
OYLEI ANTIDOTOS APOLLO
DWROY SYPALHTTIOS EIPE
N PERI WN LEGOYSIN OI KIT
IEIS PERI THS IDRYSEIWS
THI AFRODITHI TOY IEROY
EUHFISQAI TEI BOYLEI TO
YS PROEDROYS OI AN LACWS
I PROEDREYEIN EIS THN PR
WTHN EKKLHSIAN PROSAGA
GEIN AYTOYS KAI CRHMATI
SAI GNWMHN DE XYNBALLES
QAI THS BOYLHS EIS TON DH
MON OTI DOKEI THI BOYLEI
AKOYSANTA TON DHMON TWN
KITIEIWN PERI THS IDRYS
EIWS TOY IEROY KAI ALLOY
AQHNAIWN TOY BOYLOMENO
Y BOYLEYSASQAI OTI AN AY
TWI DOKEI ARISTON EINAI
EPI NIKOKRATOYS ARCONT
OS EPI THS PANDIONIDOS D
EYTERAS PRYTANEIAS TWN
PROEDRWN EPEUHFIZEN FA
NOSTRATOS FILAIDHS E**
XEN TWI DHMWI LYKORGOS *
YKOFRONOS BOYTADHS EIP
EN PERI WN OI ENPOROI OI K
ITIEIS EDOXAN ENNOMA IK
ETEYEIN AITOYNTES TON D
HMON CWRIOY ENKTHSIN EN
WI IDRYSONTAI IERON AF*
ODITHS DEDOCQAI TWI DHM
WI DOYNAI TOIS EMPOROIS
TWN KITIEWN ENKTHSI C
RIOY EN WI IDRYSONTAI TO
IERON THS AFRODITHS KAQ
APER KAI OI AIGYPTIOI TO
THS ISIDOS IERON IDRYNT
